name: Tiger Linear MCP Server (Timescale)
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Timescale (timescale org) — part of their 'Tiger' AI tooling suite — for Linear project management. Enables AI agents to query and manage Linear issues, projects, teams, and sprints through Linear's GraphQL API. Timescale's Tiger tools are built for AI-powered developer workflows.
use_cases: Managing Linear issues and projects from engineering workflow agents
Querying sprint status and team workload from planning agents
Creating and updating Linear issues from development agents
Integrating Linear project data into AI-driven engineering workflows
not_for: Teams using Jira, GitHub Issues, Shortcut, or other project management tools
Non-Linear project management (Timescale Tiger is Linear-specific)
Organizations not invested in AI-powered developer tooling
best_when: An engineering team using Linear for project management wants AI agents to query, create, and manage issues — Timescale's Tiger tools are specifically designed for AI-native development workflows.
avoid_when: You use other project management tools. Also: Timescale's Tiger tools are opinionated for their AI workflow approach — evaluate fit with your team's process.

auth.notes: Linear API key required. Set LINEAR_API_KEY environment variable. Personal API keys generated in Linear settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Linear API access is free with Linear subscription
pricing.notes: Linear subscription required (from $8/user/month). MCP server is free open source from Timescale.

known_agent_gotchas: Official from Timescale org — high quality implementation, built for AI workflows
Linear GraphQL API requires understanding of Linear's data model (issues, projects, cycles, teams)
Issue creation creates real project management records — test with non-production workspace
Timescale Tiger tool suite assumes AI-first workflow — may not fit all team processes
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to Linear GraphQL API. API key authentication. Project data includes engineering plans, priorities, and roadmaps — business sensitive. Linear SOC2 and GDPR compliant.

security_score_components.security_notes: Official Timescale implementation. Linear SOC2/GDPR compliant. Engineering roadmap data.
